message: Class is boring today too...
So boring...
I looked over the classroom. There were no faces I recognized.
Because I never tried to remember any of them.
Apparently Yuki knows a lot of people in class, though.

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Now that I think about it..."
When Yuki is cut off from the world, she perceives Hasaki as two twin sisters.
She said those illusionary twins were in her class, but it's not like Hasaki is one of her classmates, so why would she see them?
Maybe it's an illusion that she sees even when Hasaki isn't here?
I guess you can hallucinate something regardless of whether there's actually something there.

name: Tomosane
message: "I wonder if that's right..."
The illusionary world that her mind is creating has its own internal consistency.
For instance, the number of personalities. Mamiya Takuji, Minakami Yuki, and me. It's not a coincidence that there are three of us. We correspond to the Creator, the Harmonizer, and the Destroyer.
My name was even created by reversing the name Minakami Yuki and changing the reading of the characters.
So when it comes to Hasaki, Yuki doesn't see an arbitrary illusion without internal consistency.
As proof, there are several reasons why she perceives one person, Hasaki, as two twin sisters.
First, because that rabbit doll isn't just a doll to Hasaki.
Mamiya Takuji gave it to her as a gift.
Back when he was (supposedly) still normal, he made it for his little sister.
I say supposedly because I don't have any memories about it myself.
I heard it all from Yuki.
When Takuji gave her that present, that was the best time in Hasaki's life.
After that, the incident occurred.
The incident that could be called the original evil behind all our problems.
The great incident that left scars on Hasaki's mind and body.
The incident that stole all of her happy days.
After that incident...
To Hasaki, the self that continued maturing was fake.
She started to perceive the doll she received from her brother as the real Hasaki.
She declared her maturing body to be fake and insisted that the doll was the real one, all so she could stop her physical development in the happy days of her life.
Of course, Hasaki doesn't believe that anymore, but...
Her scars and trauma were so bad that she had to believe that for a certain period of time.
And of course, those scars are the reason why she still holds on to that doll.
Her spirit wasn't completely destroyed.
That doll is...
The material form of the best time in her life. Her memory itself.
That's what the doll is to her.
That's why Mamiya Takuji perceives Hasaki as twins.
The Hasaki that continues to grow... and the rabbit that's frozen in time.
Though it's a mystery why he sees the growing one as the younger sister and the one frozen in time as the elder.
Maybe it's just hard for him to look at Hasaki and see an older sister.
By the process of elimination, the rabbit that didn't have such a strong impression became the older sister.
As for the twins' names...
I don't know the details about where they came from.
Apparently he took the names from some twins in an anime. I don't really know what kind of anime it was, though.
I heard that it almost looks more like a game than an anime.
And I don't know if the illusionary twins in his delusions have the same personalities as the twins in that anime. It probably doesn't matter.
I have no idea why their last name is Wakatsuki.
Well, it was Takuji's idea, so that name is probably from an anime or an eroge. I'm sure there's no real significance to the name.
But still, the delusions are mostly logical and internally consistent.
And that's why tiny inconsistencies appear between the delusions and the real world.
Those inconsistencies are what warp his perceptions.
Yuki and Mamiya Takuji feel the warping of their perceptions especially strongly.
Mysteriously enough, I hardly ever experience any warped perceptions.
Yuki experiences a lot of these warped perceptions. Like when people call her "Mamiya," she hears it as her own name. That has never happened to me.
People call me Mamiya Takuji, and I hear it as Mamiya Takuji.
I experience some effects that are similar to Yuki and Mamiya's hallucinations, but my brain doesn't attempt to forcibly establish internal consistency.
Maybe that's the proof that I'm going to disappear soon.
A short-lived personality doesn't need that kind of consistency.
Absurd leaps forward in time. Absurd perceptions.
My brain doesn't even care if things like that happen.
After all, I'm just going to disappear eventually.
"Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa! Hey!"

name: Teacher
message: "Haa... What is it, Mamiya?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... It's nothing."

name: Teacher
message: "If it's nothing, then don't raise your voice, please."

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hey, you..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I brought you lunch."

name: Tomosane
message: "You dummy..."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's your fault. You never bring the lunchboxes I make for you to school."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, it wasn't me this morning."

name: Hasaki
message: "Either way, I made you lunch."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You shouldn't do that. At least don't come in during class."

name: Hasaki
message: "I stand out a lot more during the breaks, since all the students are out in the halls."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's true, but..."

name: Miu
message: "Ahahahaha, you should take it and be thankful."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who are you?"

name: Miu
message: "You know who I am. We've been in the same class all year long."
Who is this?

name: Miu
message: "Jeez, don't look at me like you don't know who I am."

name: Hasaki
message: "Miu-san always opens the door for me and helps me make it over to this side of the classroom."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"
Now that I think of it, Hasaki actually has brought me lunch during class a few times before.

name: Miu
message: "I mean, Hasaki-chan always comes over to me and asks where Tomo Nii-san is."

name: Miu
message: "Oh right, Mamiya-kun, was your first name Tomo?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, it's Takuji, but..."

name: Miu
message: "Then why does Hasaki-chan call you Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's just..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, it's just because I'm her friend and her big brother. Don't worry about it too much."
I just made up a lie.
More importantly, Hasaki made friends with someone at my school while I wasn't looking.

name: Hasaki
message: "I'll make dinner today, so don't you dare eat cup ramen somewhere."

name: Tomosane
message: "I was planning on going to Hakushuukyou right after school."

name: Hasaki
message: "No. Eat dinner at the house first, then go to work! There will be too much if you don't come eat some."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just put it in the fridge, then."

name: Hasaki
message: "I want you to eat it when it's warm."

name: Tomosane
message: "What for?"

name: Teacher
message: "Mamiya!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, yes!"

name: Teacher
message: "My hearing's terrible, and even I can hear you. Can't you at least talk a little quieter?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, s-sure..."
So you don't mind if I talk as long as I'm quiet?

name: Teacher
message: "Jeez... This always happens because you never remember to bring the lunch your sister packs for you. You should learn from your mistakes."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yes... Wait, huh?"
What did he say?
My sister...

name: Teacher
message: "I'm losing my hearing, so I don't notice. The other teachers would scold you if they saw that."

name: Tomosane
message: "O-Okay..."

name: Hasaki
message: "P-Please excuse me..."

name: Teacher
message: "Well, okay... But it's a problem if you come in during class, so try to do it inbetween classes from now on."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, okay... Thank you."

name: Teacher
message: "And remember, I'm losing my hearing, so let's just say I was talking to myself this entire time."
Wait... How long have the teachers known about Hasaki?

name: Miu
message: "Ahaha, what are you so surprised about, Mamiya-kun?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... I didn't think the teachers knew about Hasaki is all."

name: Miu
message: "Why would you think that? She's always wandering the halls here at school."

name: Miu
message: "She's kind of famous, since she's such a good little girl that always comes to bring her big brother lunch."

name: Male Student
message: "I'm jealous that you have such a nice sister, Mamiya-kun."

name: Female Student
message: "I wish I had a sister like that."

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Sure..."
What's going on? Why are all these people acting like we're friends or something.

name: Teacher
message: "Class is dismissed."

name: Hasaki
message: "Sorry..."

name: Miu
message: "Don't worry about it. It's his fault for forgetting his lunch all the time."

name: Miu
message: "And thanks to that, we all got to meet you, Hasaki-chan."
I knew Hasaki had brought me lunch during class before, but I didn't recall it being like this.

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki..."
This atmosphere in the class... It must be Yuki's doing.
Yuki always says she hates people, but she makes friends so easily that everyone likes her.
I could never do that... and it's kind of bothersome for me, really.

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you... mad at me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... It's nothing."

name: Male Student
message: "You have such a cute little sister, Mamiya-kun."

name: Male Student
message: "Her name's Hasaki-chan."

name: Male Student
message: "Oh wow... Where do you go to school, Hasaki-chan?"
They all talk to her so casually.
The original Mamiya Takuji was always treated like a leper, and he even turned into an object of fear after my personality was born, but...
Somehow, before I even realized, I'd turned into someone that they all felt comfortable talking to.
What a pain in the ass...

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, I'm not going to school."

name: Male Student
message: "Oh, do you take courses online?"

name: Female Student
message: "God, would you shut up? That's none of your business."

name: Male Student
message: "Ahahaha."
Maybe that's why...
Maybe the reason the other Yuki personality always sees the Wakatsuki twins here at school is because Hasaki comes and wanders around the halls so much.
Hasaki's presence is such an open secret that Yuki might start to think of her as another classmate.

name: Miu
message: "Just be careful. Mr. Izumida doesn't really mind, but Senagawa would forbid Hasaki from the school if she found out."

name: Tomosane
message: "Okay..."
This is a comfortable environment for Hasaki. That must be Yuki's work too.
But this is ridiculous.
If she starts making any trouble at all for the school, she definitely won't be allowed on school grounds anymore.
I have to admit, though, it would make my life a lot easier if she wasn't allowed at school. Annoying stuff like this wouldn't happen anymore.
All of my classes ended.
My consciousness never faded. I had to sit through the entire school day.
It was kind of a pain in the ass, but I took notes, listened to the teachers, and thought about all their useless drivel, so in a way I was a model student.
Lately I've been thinking... this might not be so bad.

name: Tomosane
message: "Okay, then... Time for work."

name: Miu
message: "Huh? Didn't your sister tell you to check in at home first?"
One of the girls from my class blocked my way. It was the girl with the seat next to the door, who always lets Hasaki in.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Please don't pry into other people's domestic matters."

name: Miu
message: "Domestic matters... Is that really the problem here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Every person should make their own path."

name: Tomosane
message: "And besides, how long have you known about Hasaki, girl?"

name: Miu
message: "Girl? I have a name, you know. It's Iwada Miu."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, sorry. How long have you known about Hasaki, Iwada?"

name: Miu
message: "I've known about her from the beginning, of course. I sit in the back, right next to the hall, so there's no way I would miss a girl sneaking into the classroom."

name: Tomosane
message: "When was that?"

name: Miu
message: "When?
I don't remember exactly... but since the beginning of the school year, maybe? I guess that would make it some time in April?"
April... Even during the first month of classes...

name: Miu
message: "Yeah. I was the one who told her to wait until there was an old guy teaching the class, so now she only comes in when Mr. Izumida is teaching."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... But it sounded like Izumida knew."

name: Miu
message: "Maybe it's because he's about to retire? He's pretty lax. He doesn't bother with stuff he doesn't have to."

name: Miu
message: "And he knows that everyone has their own circumstances."

name: Tomosane
message: "Circumstances, huh..."
Maybe the teachers here at school understood just how complicated the situation at the Mamiya house was.

name: Miu
message: "Well, I couldn't say for sure. Maybe it's just because Hasaki is so cute that she can get away with it."
I never asked for your opinion.

name: Miu
message: "So anyway, you have such a cute little sister. You should be nice to her."
That has nothing to do with you.
I wanted to yell at her.

name: Tomosane
message: "A cute little sister, huh?"

name: Miu
message: "Yeah, I'm really jealous of you, Mamiya-kun. You're surrounded by such cute things all the time."

name: Tomosane
message: "Surrounded?"

name: Miu
message: "Like the strap on your cell phone. It's really cute. Was that a present from your sister?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Cell phone?"
I've hardly used it. I don't even know how long I've been carrying this old thing around. The battery is so old that I never get a chance to use it.
Why would Mamiya Takuji carry around such a useless old phone?
The old cell phone had an old strap on it too.

name: Miu
message: "Those twin rabbit dolls are just like the one Hasaki-chan always carries around."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, well... Maybe it is."
I wouldn't know.
There were twin rabbit dolls attached to the cell phone by straps, just like Miu said.

name: Miu
message: "What a nice sister you have."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."
This woman is so annoying. I can't believe Yuki made friends with a girl like this while I wasn't looking.
I'd like to brush her off, but the new Yuki will live the rest of her life as Mamiya Takuji.
I can't destroy a human relationship that she's made on a whim.
I'm surprised how much has changed in less than six months. This all must be part of the preparations for Mamiya Takuji's rebirth.
The woman called Iwada didn't just look at me. She stopped and stared at me.

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Do you need something?"

name: Miu
message: "Oh, uh, that's not it..."

name: Miu
message: "I feel like your personality changes a little from time to time."
Changes a little, huh?
If it's just changing "a little," that must mean the inconsistencies in our perceptions are doing a good job in keeping our external behavior consistent.
Three completely different people are sharing this same body, after all.

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you saying that I'm hard to get along with right now?"

name: Miu
message: "Oh, uh, I dunno about that..."
Iwada smiled.
Well, it's hard to tell someone they're being a jerk to their face. You can't just tell someone, "It's hard to get along with you."
If she didn't want to say it to my face, she shouldn't have pointed it out in the first place.

name: Miu
message: "I wouldn't say you're easy to get along with, but you seem nicer than usual."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nicer than usual?"

name: Miu
message: "Yeah, I just got the feeling like you really loved your little sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? What part of that conversation would make you think that?"

name: Miu
message: "No, today was what really convinced me. You were definitely stern with her, but I could tell you were thinking about what's best for her."

name: Miu
message: "Well, it's not a big deal. See ya."
What was that?
I guess you can't judge people from appearances. I don't get it.

name: Tomosane
message: "That was weird... Oh well."
I looked at the clock.
I had to be at work soon.

name: Tomosane
message: "It would be a huge pain in the ass to go home and then to work."
I should just head straight to Hakushuukyou.

name: Miu
message: "Oh right, Mamiya-kun."

name: Tomosane
message: "What, you're still here?"

name: Miu
message: "Hasaki-chan is making dinner for you, so I think she'll be really sad if you don't go home first."

name: Tomosane
message: "...Yeah."

name: Miu
message: "Well? I know you said it would be a pain."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Would you please stay away from me? You're honestly kind of annoying."

name: Miu
message: "Ahahaha, I'm a busybody. Well, you should listen to your classmates' advice from time to time. See ya."

name: Tomosane
message: "My classmates' advice, huh?"
It's not like any other classmates have ever given me advice...

name: Tomosane
message: "All right..."
I'll walk to Suginomiya and then make a decision.
What? I'm being followed again.
By Shiroyama?
No, they wouldn't try to jump me before sunset. It's not Shiroyama.
They're just trailing me. It's probably one person.
It must be that guy from before.
Haa... If he's alone, I can just do the same thing as last time.

name: Kimura
message: "H-Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yo."

name: Kimura
message: "H-How did you know?"
It played out just like before.
I walked faster and then turned into an alley, where I waited for my pursuer.
This time I turned into a parking lot to wait for Kimura.
Why does that dumbass carry around such a huge camera when he's trailing someone? He did the same thing last time.

name: Tomosane
message: "You're still following me, huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, no... I was following a celebrity."

name: Tomosane
message: "Kimura Nobukatsu, journalist. Or are you a paparazzi now?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahahaha, that's right."

name: Kimura
message: "Wait, I lied! Don't hit me!"

name: Tomosane
message: "If you don't want to get hit, then don't make shit up."

name: Kimura
message: "U-Um, what would you be doing today?"

name: Tomosane
message: "None of your business. I told you I wouldn't let you off easy if I caught you following me again."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh... There's a reason I'm following you."

name: Tomosane
message: "For your own benefit, I'm sure."

name: Kimura
message: "No, there's more..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, is that so? Not just for your own benefit? You know what will happen if you lie to me again, don't you?"

name: Kimura
message: "Uh, you were the illegitimate son of the founder of that one religion, the White Lotus Association, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahh, my camera!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why, you... What are you investigating?"

name: Kimura
message: "Y-You can't! That's my F2 Photomic! You can't buy those anymore!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I care. Why are you even using such an old piece of shit?"

name: Kimura
message: "Because you destroyed my Reflex D3 the other day, of course!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about? A reflex something or other?"

name: Kimura
message: "A DSLR camera! The F2 Photomic is the greatest mechanical SLR camera, but the D3 is the king of all DSLRs!"
He's awfully passionate about this stuff. Is he obsessed with cameras or something? I guess it's just work-related for him, though.

name: Kimura
message: "It was originally designed for the battleship Yamato, so it's Japan's glory!"

name: Tomosane
message: "All right, I got it, I got it. So you'd rather I broke you instead of your camera. How about your arm? Or maybe your leg, so you can't walk anymore?"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh... I'm terribly sorry."

name: Tomosane
message: "So then, what were you investigating?"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh... Nothing in particular."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh... So how about we start with the camera, and then go for the legs? Or maybe we should do something special and go for the eyes? Then I'm sure you wouldn't have any use for those cameras of yours."

name: Kimura
message: "No, I-I wouldn't be able to work. But really, I hardly know anything."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... All right, if you say so. You can only try the patience of a saint for so long."

name: Kimura
message: "Wait. Jesus always said to turn the other cheek."

name: Tomosane
message: "What? You want your body dumped in the creek?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, no... I didn't say anything."

name: Tomosane
message: "What can I do to make you give up?"

name: Kimura
message: "I've given up."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really? You expect me to believe that when first you were investigating me, now you're investigating my family too, and you're talking about how you 'hardly know anything.'"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahaha... Well, there was so much interesting stuff about you."

name: Kimura
message: "Your supposed father is Mamiya Hiro, but Mamiya Takuji is definitely the illegitimate child of Mamiya Kotomi and the White Lotus Association founder Shire Tarou."

name: Kimura
message: "That new age religion has a great deal of political influence, so I was really surprised how easy it was to investigate his illegitimate child."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm really surprised how easy it was to make this dumbass tell me all that."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh... It's nothing to hide."

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, we can't talk here. The police over there are looking at us."

name: Tomosane
message: "Police?"

name: Kimura
message: "Look. You probably can't see them very well, but..."
I turned my head for a second.
There weren't any police there, or anyone at all.

name: Tomosane
message: "What police...?!"
My vision burned white.
I can't believe it. I fell for the same trick twice.
That guy is pretty smart.
If he just made me look and then ran, I could catch him easily.
If he just ran and tried to blind me while he was running away, the result would be the same.
If I heard him move even an inch while I was turned around, my body would react instantly.

The reason he got me right in the eyes with that flashlight was because he didn't move at all while I was turned around. Instead, he just held up the flashlight so it was right in my face when I turned around.
He didn't make the slightest movement aside from holding up the flashlight.
That's why I couldn't react in time.

name: Tomosane
message: "His acting was pretty good too."
He carries around that huge camera, so it's not hard to spot him when he follows me, but other than that, he definitely knows what he's doing.
If he hadn't experienced situations like this before, he wouldn't be able to do that.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Well, anyway."
I looked at my cell phone.
That journalist took up some more of my time.
If I went back to the house and ate before going to work, I'd be late.
I felt bad for Hasaki, but I had to head straight to Hakushuukyou now.

name: Hasaki
message: "I knew it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I knew you would come straight here without going home."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, why are you here? You're not working today, are you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I got a text from Miu-san. She said you might not come home."

name: Tomosane
message: "Miu? Wait, you mean Iwada?!"
What's her problem? What a busybody.

name: Hasaki
message: "I told you to come eat dinner at the house."

name: Tomosane
message: "Something came up. It's not like I wasn't planning on going home."

name: Hasaki
message: "That a fact?"
Damn it. That girl sure likes sticking her nose where it doesn't belong.
But she got a text from Miu, huh?
That must mean Hasaki exchanged phone numbers with other people.
That feels a bit weird.
I thought Hasaki hated people even more than I do.
That must be Yuki's influence too.

name: Hasaki
message: "Master said I could use one of the tables here until the store opens, so I made it here."

name: Tomosane
message: "Here?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, dinner."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I see."
Hasaki's cooking was the same as usual.
To be honest, this faggot Master's cooking is better, but Hasaki is a lot younger. I should be thankful to her.
Even if she did forget to cut the okra.
Even if there are still pieces of bonito in it because she sliced it too thinly when she was making the soup stock.

name: Hasaki
message: "Don't laugh at my food, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Was I laughing?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You weren't laughing, but I could tell what you were thinking. I'll be more careful next time."

name: Hasaki
message: "I know the okra isn't cut, and I didn't get all the bonito shavings out of the soup stock..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, if you don't shave the bonito so thinly, it's easier to get out. Then you don't have to worry about it."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that makes sense."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The store isn't open yet, is it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No. We're still closed."

name: Tomosane
message: "It sounds like there are a bunch of faggots outside fighting."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, they're not fighting. Today is Master's birthday."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, a couple days ago we had to rush and put together a party."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, that day when you came home earlier than expected?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, it didn't take as long as I thought."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm, is that so?"
And that's when tragedy befell me... Which means I can blame Master for that one.

name: Tomosane
message: "Master's birthday, huh? That must be why those creatures are all making a ruckus outside."

name: Hasaki
message: "Creatures?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry about it."
I unlocked the door and opened it.

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut the fuck up! We're not open yet!"

name: Faggot
message: "Huh?"

name: Faggot
message: "Huh? Is that you, Tomo-kun?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa... What's this?"

name: Faggot
message: "It's a champagne shower, of course."

name: Tomosane
message: "But why are you doing that to me?"

name: Faggot
message: "Because we thought Master would come out."

name: Tomosane
message: "Look who you're spraying next time, damn it!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What the hell is this? The only thing you have for me to change into is girls' clothes?!"

name: Master
message: "Ahahaha, the plan was a success."

name: Tomosane
message: "So this was your plan all along..."

name: Master
message: "It's the only birthday I'll have all year, you know. What better present than having you dress up in such a cute little dress?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A cute dress, huh?"
A cute dress... It is an awfully frilly dress, but...

name: Master
message: "Yeah, and I had Hasaki-chan take your measurements."

name: Tomosane
message: "My measurements?"

name: Hasaki
message: "We still had the measurements for your school uniform."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why, you..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Sorry..."

name: Master

message: "No way!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... It's all right, Hasaki-chan. He's not thinking about anyone but you, Hasaki-chan."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But that's..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's just... as a little sister, right?"
What's she talking about now? What else is there?
But still... I know she gets stubborn whenever I say that I don't view her as anything but a sister.
If I wanted, I could say it's not like that. Though I'd have to be careful how I phrased it.

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course it is!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe, I wouldn't be so sure about that. Oh well. I'm certain that Tomosane isn't thinking about any other girls, at least."

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... Don't worry about it, Hasaki-chan. You like bullies after all, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "So maybe it's better that he can't be honest about it, since he's like a bully?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Not at all."

name: Hasaki
message: "How can you keep that kind of attitude around the person you like, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "L-Like I said, she was just making a joke, Hasaki."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean by attitude?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're naked right now, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah... Well, Tomosane said he wasn't looking, and he doesn't even want to look."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "Something like that."

name: Hasaki
message: "I guess so. Tomo Nii-san isn't good for anything, anyway."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Hasaki-chan left."

name: Tomosane
message: "Phew..."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you so relieved for, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course I'm relieved. You're bad enough, but add my little sister to the equation too and I can't even think straight."

name: Yuki
message: "Your little sister, huh? It's only at times like this that you think of her as a sister, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right. At times like this, I'm just a little sister..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Hasaki-chan? You're still there in the changing room?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes, I'm still here. Because..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I haven't washed my body yet."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You dummy, Hasaki! Where's your swimsuit?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I can't wash myself when I'm wearing that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You dummy, that's not what I'm talking about!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Then what's the problem? I'm your little sister, so there's no problem, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "D-Dummy! You're not a little kid anymore!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You only treat me like a little kid when it's convenient for you, don't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's not the problem here..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Besides, Yuki-san is naked, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki only exists in my head!"

name: Hasaki
message: "But to you it's just like she really exists."

name: Tomosane
message: "That doesn't mean..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't think there's a problem. Just don't look at me."

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hey, Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "M-Me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki is doing this because you said all that stuff!"

name: Yuki
message: "Really? I think it's your fault this time."

name: Hasaki
message: "How long are you gonna be washing up? You should come in the tub too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? There's no way two people could fit in that tub!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm, you must be scared because you think you'll get turned on."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's impossible."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then what's the problem?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-I'm still washing up..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm, is that so?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Move over. I need to wash myself too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, but... there's only one seat."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'll just sit on the floor, then."
Wh-What's going on here?

name: Tomosane
message: "M-Maybe I should get out now..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You haven't washed yourself at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I just like to take quick baths is all."

name: Yuki
message: "I like to take long ones."

name: Hasaki
message: "See?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki, why'd you say that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's it matter? You're not turned on by your little sister, now are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not a problem of getting turned on or not!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Then what's the problem?"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, let's just wash and get it over with. You haven't washed your hair yet, either."
Jeez... Maybe Yuki doesn't mind because she's a woman, but...

name: Yuki
message: "What? You can't control yourself when she's sitting right beside you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "You don't think of Hasaki-chan as just a sister, do you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course I do!"

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "You really do treat her like your sister only when it's convenient, just like she said."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut it!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you talking to Yuki-san in secret again?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-It's not a s-secret or anything important like that!"

name: Yuki
message: "Really? It's not important how you think of Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that probably isn't important to Tomo Nii-san at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's not what I meant."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, now you made Hasaki-chan mad again, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's your fault!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... I don't care anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "Okay, I'm getting out now!"

name: Yuki
message: "Wait a second. You have to use conditioner too!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What the hell is that?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, was this yours, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Is that a good brand?"

name: Yuki
message: "I think so. It had good reviews online."

name: Hasaki
message: "It must be really expensive."

name: Yuki
message: "Wanna try it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Can I?"

name: Yuki
message: "Sure, I don't mind."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who cares about that? Let me get out of here already!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I care. Be quiet, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "How much of this should I use? Especially this tube of treatment."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you want me to do it for you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you dumb? You and I look the same to Hasaki. There's no way she's okay with that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san, would you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, sure."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you ignoring me? Why are you saying yes?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're awfully annoying, Tomo Nii-san. Don't butt into our conversation, please."
Yuki circled around behind Hasaki.
Well, I guess it's better this way since I don't have to worry about seeing anything I shouldn't.

name: Yuki
message: "This should be enough conditioner for your hair, I think."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's about how much shampoo I use, too."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it's about as thick as normal shampoo, so I'm not surprised."

name: Hasaki
message: "All right, will you please?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah?! Wh-What?!"
When Yuki's fingers touched Hasaki's head, my fingers caressed her hair.

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki, what are you―"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, brothers and sisters should get along once in a while. Now put about a finger-sized bit of treatment in your palm and rub it on evenly."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Good night. I'm tired, so I'm gonna dip out."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean, dip out? You can't log out now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey!"

name: Hasaki
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki disappeared."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, it's nothing unusual, but..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Which means, right now..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The two of us are alone."

name: Hasaki
message: "Alone!"
Hasaki suddenly blushed when she heard that word.
No, that doesn't make sense. From her viewpoint, it's just been the two of us from the beginning.
But I couldn't say that. I wavered for a moment.

name: Tomosane
message: "U-Um, I don't know how to put on the treatment, so maybe I should just get out now."

name: Tomosane
message: "U-Um, I kind of went along with it when Yuki was around, but we really shouldn't be doing this."
To be honest, it was bad even when Yuki was around. Yuki just dragged me along with her stupidity, and Hasaki was too stubborn to stop.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ahahaha... I'll get out."
When I tried to stand up, Hasaki grabbed my arm.

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Finish what you started."
What I started...

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, I don't understand what you mean!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, I already closed my eyes. I can't open them now."
She closed her eyes, so she can't open them now? That doesn't really make sense.
I guess there are a lot of shampoos out there that sting if you get them in your eyes.
But...

name: Tomosane
message: "No, but..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I'm just your little sister, after all. What's the problem? And besides, you already saw me naked..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... For the record, I did my best to not look."

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Then keep doing your best and it'll be fine."
It won't be fine at all.
Yeah, this doesn't even make sense anymore. Why am I taking a bath with Hasaki, and why do I have to wash her hair?
Besides...
Truthfully, I shouldn't be alone with Hasaki like this.
Even if she is my sister, two people of our age can't be naked and alone together.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yeah..."
At Hasaki's urging, I continued to apply the conditioner and other hair products to Hasaki's scalp.
Sadly enough, it was a lot easier than I expected once I got started. Yuki's experience was still in my body.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahahaha... You're pretty good at this, Tomo Nii-san. Have you done this for Yuki-san before?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No. That's never happened, ever. We share the same body, so I have most of the same skills and experiences that she does."

name: Hasaki
message: "I see."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, and Mamiya Takuji should be able to do everything that we can do."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm... Then you know how to put on the treatment too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, wait!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Please put on the treatment too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"
Hasaki grabbed my hand.
Her hand was small, soft... and very warm.
And it was...
Trembling.

name: Tomosane
message: "What's wrong, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, it's nothing..."
I knew right away that Hasaki was crying.
Not from her voice.
And of course, I couldn't see her face from behind...
But somehow, I knew right away that Hasaki was crying.

name: Hasaki
message: "I think I know... why you always push me away, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "But that's selfish."

name: Hasaki
message: "You think that if you push me away, we won't ever grow closer... but you're wrong."
She didn't say it directly.
But I could tell she was blaming me.
She didn't blame me because I was going to disappear, but rather, because I pushed her away to avoid growing closer to her.
No, because I tried to avoid growing closer to her... but still did.

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know... what will happen to you or Yuki in the future."

name: Hasaki
message: "Even if I did know... there's nothing I can do about it."

name: Hasaki
message: "But there is something I do know for sure..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "The treatment!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "At least do that for me. Th-This is really embarrassing, you know!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? E-Embarrassing?"

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Of course it is!"

name: Tomosane
message: "B-But you were the one who came barging in, and you took off your swimsuit..."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But that was... Oh, shut up! Sometimes a girl has to do things that are embarrassing!"
She fiercely spat out those words.
A girl has to do things that are embarrassing... Is that true?
I don't really understand, but I think that might be true.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What kind of person wouldn't be embarrassed about being seen naked?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, an exhibitionist, maybe?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Don't lump me in with those people!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... Sorry."
Uh... Somehow we're getting off topic.

name: Hasaki
message: "Did you think I wasn't embarrassed about this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why did you do it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I told you, sometimes you have to do things like this. That's why. Um... It's kind of like how sometimes a nuclear meltdown can happen even when it's supposed to be impossible for the reactor to malfunction! It's just like that!"
No, uh... I don't think it's like that at all.

name: Hasaki
message: "Anyway, you can wash out the conditioner now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, sure..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahhh... That feels good... Wow, my hair is so soft."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."
When the conditioner was in her hair, it felt nice and slippery, but once I washed the conditioner out it changed to a soft, silky feeling.
Ooh... This is totally different from the feeling of a guy's hair. Or maybe that's because she's still so young?
She looks a lot younger than she actually is.
That must be because of her Mamiya blood.

name: Hasaki
message: "Keep going."

name: Tomosane
message: "A-All right..."
There was no point resisting at this point. I put a little bit in my palm just like Yuki told me and rubbed it into Hasaki's hair.
This "treatment" stuff was more viscous than shampoo or conditioner, like paste.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah... It feels funny."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is designed for use on people's hair, right? It kind of reminds me of something else."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's because it comes in a tube. It's different from the shampoo or conditioner."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you usually use, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hm? Probably the same thing you use. Just shampoo and conditioner. I've been interested in these bottles in the bathroom for a while now, but I never knew how to use the treatment or anything like that."

It was just like the shampoo and conditioner, but someone who didn't know that might have thought it was supposed to go on your face. Makeup remover has about the same consistency as this stuff, I think.

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm gonna rinse it out now."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Already?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, you're supposed to wash this out right away."
I gently rinsed the treatment out of her hair.
It says that I can just wash it out like normal, but apparently it can cause a rash if someone has weak skin, so I was extra careful as I rinsed her hair with water.
After it all rinsed out, her hair was even softer than before.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wow, this is amazing!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Good for you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah!"
Hasaki cheerfully turned toward me.
And because of where I was standing, she turned to face my...

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah―"
I could tell she was about to scream, and I prepared myself in case she was about to hit me in a very delicate area.

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki!"
Hasaki fainted on the spot.

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Wait... what?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Phew... You're awake now?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Uh, I was... in the bathroom."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. You fainted."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, I see..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You could at least act surprised... Jeez."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh... If I fainted, then..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... Uh, I tried not to look, so..."

name: Hasaki
message: "These are your pajamas."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know where you keep your underwear... and I couldn't put those on you with my eyes closed, so I just put my pajamas on you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, you're right. I'm not wearing any underwear."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-Those just came out of the wash, so you can wear them for now. They're not dirty or anything."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why would your pajamas be dirty?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, they would be dirty if I was wearing them."

name: Hasaki
message: "But you were saying it like your pajamas were usually dirty."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh, I just thought you wouldn't want to wear your brother's pajamas."
I thought she was about to argue with me again, but she gave me a big smile.

name: Hasaki
message: "Not at all. I like how they smell like you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, what do you mean?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Exactly what I said..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Okay, now get to sleep. You can have my bed."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, this is your room."

name: Tomosane
message: "I couldn't go into your room, could I? Besides, I was rushing, so I just carried you into my room since I know where everything is in here."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, don't move yet. You might still be a bit anemic, so don't move. Just get some rest."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? What about you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll sleep on the couch."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wait, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I might feel sick later tonight. You know, if the blood vessels in your brain burst, you don't have symptoms right away."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I don't think anyone in our family has ever died of a stroke."

name: Hasaki
message: "I might be the first."

name: Tomosane
message: "So what do you want me to do about it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Let's sleep together."

name: Tomosane
message: "You know..."
I was about to give her the usual excuse, but...
For some reason, I stopped myself.
Maybe her words plucked on one of my heartstrings.

name: Tomosane
message: "I think that if I push you away, we won't ever grow closer, but... I'm wrong."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's nothing. Well, okay. I wouldn't want you wetting the bed, now would I?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hey, I don't wet the bed. Besides, there's nothing you could do if I did!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Really? I could find a way to dry it so no one else found out."

name: Hasaki
message: "I could do that myself. Besides, I don't wet the bed!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh. Good to know."
That night, Hasaki and I slept in the same bed.
It felt kind of nostalgic.
Somewhere in my forgotten memories... no, in Mamiya's forgotten memories, something like this must've happened before.
I'm sure of it.

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not all."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What do you mean, that's not all?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're my little sister, so I have to protect you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Protect me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. Yuki does too. We both have to protect you... as your big brother, and as your father too."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's the reason why we're here today."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. That would make me the big sister, and the mother too."

name: Tomosane
message: "You look like a man from the outside, though."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. Just look at these melons!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up, and don't rub those things on me!"

name: Hasaki
message: "What are you doing, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "A-Ahahaha, sorry."

name: Hasaki
message: "But I think Tomo Nii-san is right... I don't think I'm really happy with that answer though."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh, nothing... But now I know that you're thinking of what's best for me, Tomo Nii-san... I know that now."

name: Tomosane
message: "But?"

name: Yuki
message: "That was a pretty good answer, but I don't think it's the one Hasaki-chan wanted to hear."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it's the truth. Now that our father is dead and our mother is catatonic, who else is going to protect Hasaki?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm thinking of what's best for Hasaki, just like you told me to do, Yuki. That's what I have to do to protect Hasaki."
Those were my genuine feelings.
I said it partially because I wanted to keep my distance from Hasaki, but... those were still my most genuine feelings.

name: Hasaki
message: "Hahahaha... I can't believe you would say that now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Nothing... It's nothing. Really. I'm just a bother, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you saying?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay, I'm getting out. I can't wash my body with this swimsuit on, anyway."

name: Hasaki
message: "And I wouldn't want to take it off in front of you, even if you are my brother."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right, I'm about done."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Go ahead, take your time."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I already washed my body. Right, Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well... Okay, I guess."

name: Yuki
message: "I'd like to spend a bit more time washing, personally."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing, nothing."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right... We'll take our time."

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "I never thought you would say that."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not like I lied to her."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I think you wanted to keep your distance from her, but I suppose you didn't lie to her."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... It was the truth."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I understand what you said about protecting Hasaki."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't have much time left, though."

name: Yuki
message: "You keep saying that."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's the truth."

name: Yuki
message: "How do you know it's the truth?"

name: Tomosane
message: "More importantly... Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I really don't know where to look, so could you put on some clothes?"

name: Yuki
message: "No way. I like to be naked after I get out of the bath."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't care what you like! Put on some fucking clothes!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on. I'm giving you some fan service."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's what we call an unwelcome favor."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez... Oh fine. I'm at my limit anyway."

name: Tomosane
message: "Your limit?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, sorry. I know we're in the middle of a conversation, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki?"
Yuki suddenly disappeared.
She instantly disappeared, like her batteries suddenly ran out.

name: Tomosane
message: "She's overdoing it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh well... Not my problem."

name: Hasaki
message: "I-It is too your problem, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki, I'm getting out."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? You haven't washed your hair yet."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up!"
I left the bathroom in a hurry.
When I left, I turned and saw that Yuki had already disappeared.

name: Tomosane
message: "She was overdoing it. Why would she force herself to stay for something dumb like this?"
